Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] If it is a core system change, I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have not broken the biological isolation of agents.
- [ ] `pytest core/ -v` passes locally.
